rationale: AI Verify's dependability tests can generate technical evidence relevant to the Model AI Governance Framework's operations-management practices for robustness, security and lifecycle monitoring.
limits: AI Verify does not certify legal compliance, eliminate system risk or prove that every governance practice in the Model Framework has been implemented; test validity remains model-, data-, metric- and use-case-dependent.
